result.markdown: --- title: "[RMSTResult]{.doc-object-name .doc-class .doc-label .doc-label-dataclass}" body-classes: doc-api-page page-navigation: false html-table-processing: none --- ::: {.doc-subject} Results of an RMST comparison test or difference calculation. ::: ::: {.doc-usage-source} Usage [Source](https://github.com/rich-iannone/greenwood/blob/main/greenwood/_rmst.py#L34-L127){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} ::: ::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.CLASS} ```python RMSTResult( estimate, se, lower_ci, upper_ci, statistic, p_value, method, group1, group2, rmst1, se1, rmst2, se2, tau, estimand="difference", stratified=False, conf_level=0.95 ) ``` ::: ::: {.doc-text} This class stores the results of RMST group comparisons in a structured format, including point estimates, confidence intervals, and hypothesis test statistics. ::: ## Attributes {.doc-attributes} ::: {.doc-definition-items} [estimate]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : The point estimate of RMST difference, ratio, or percentage difference between groups. [lower_ci]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Lower bound of the confidence interval for the estimate. [upper_ci]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Upper bound of the confidence interval for the estimate. [se]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Standard error of the estimate. [statistic]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Test statistic (z-score for Wald test) for the null hypothesis of no difference. [p_value]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Two-tailed p-value for the hypothesis test. Small values (typically < 0.05) indicate significant differences between groups. [method]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [str]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Human-readable description of the comparison method, e.g., `"RMST difference (tau=365)"`. [group1]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [Any]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Label of the first group (minuend in difference). [group2]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [Any]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Label of the second group (subtrahend in difference). [rmst1]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : RMST estimate for group 1 at tau. [se1]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Standard error of RMST for group 1. [rmst2]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : RMST estimate for group 2 at tau. [se2]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Standard error of RMST for group 2. [tau]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : The restriction time tau used in the RMST calculation. [estimand]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [str]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : The type of estimand: `"difference"`, `"ratio"`, or `"percentage_difference"`. [stratified]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Whether this is a stratified comparison (True) or pooled (False). [conf_level]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Confidence level used for interval estimation (the default is `0.95`). ::: ## Examples {.doc-examples} Compare RMST between two groups: ::: {#819e253d .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import greenwood as gw lung = gw.load_dataset("lung", backend="polars") y = gw.Surv.right(lung["time"], event=(lung["status"] == 2)) result = gw.rmst_test(y, tau=365, group=lung["sex"]) result ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` RMSTResult(method='RMST difference (tau=365)', estimate=-55.9703, se=14.9581, 95% CI=[-85.2877, -26.6529], p_value=0.0001827) ``` ::: ::: Access individual components: ::: {#06aee026 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} result.estimate # difference between groups result.p_value # significance result.se # standard error ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ``` np.float64(14.958125860424103) ``` ::: :::
